effect: lossless composition of accepted mode authorities only; no repeated review or new evidence

mode_registry.carrier: one native P coherence scalar is the complete causal C_P
mode_registry.write_update: registered native source packets arrive at the same P through public schedule_packet_departure plus step
mode_registry.response_access: one native feedback front mask [P] against rear mask [B_ref]; expected source digest is null
mode_registry.causal_history_role: none; ordered packet/surface lineage L is audit-only
intervention_family: native write diversion away from P
mode_registry.private_binding: separate native P1 and P2 one-node reads with no common read or aggregate
mode_registry.producer_boundary: RCAE declares roles/schedules/guards only; native PyGRC owns every causal pool and later-response transition
mode_registry.restoration_owner: native LGRC9V3 restoration identity v2 plus external declarative role/access/intervention binding

mode_registry.carrier: authoritative active H_P plus its declared native M_H = R_H(H_P) output-port binding
mode_registry.write_update: adapter admits source-label-free tokens from registered native arrivals, appends H_P, computes R_H, and requests public native packets to materialize M_H
mode_registry.response_access: one native feedback front mask [M_H] against rear mask [B_ref]; P and lineage are excluded
mode_registry.causal_state_role: P is matched non-primary encounter/audit state and cannot enter V
mode_registry.private_binding: separate H1/M_H1 and H2/M_H2 carriers/readouts with no shared reducer or aggregate
mode_registry.producer_boundary: RCAEActiveHistoryAdapterV1 owns only H_P admission/intervention/readout materialization; native PyGRC owns score, threshold, scheduling, and later response
mode_registry.restoration_owner: paired native-v2 plus adapter current/reset identity under one manifest and external role/intervention binding

mode_registry.owner_acceptance_authority: owner direction opening section 8.1 after P2-I2-DEC-017
mode_registry.carrier: one composite native P plus authoritative H_P with M_H = R_H(H_P)
mode_registry.write_update: each admitted native contribution updates P and supplies one H_P token; adapter materializes M_H without reading P for success
mode_registry.response_access: one native feedback front mask [P,M_H] against rear mask [B_ref] reads both live components exactly once
mode_registry.causal_component_rule: P and H_P/M_H are separately intervenable through the same V; nonlinearity, interaction, synergy, and irreducibility are not required
intervention_family: native P-only debit with H_P/M_H fixed
mode_registry.private_binding: separate P1/H1/M_H1 and P2/H2/M_H2 pairs with pair-local masks and no aggregate
mode_registry.producer_boundary: adapter owns only active history/readout materialization; native PyGRC owns live joint score, threshold, scheduling, and later response
mode_registry.restoration_owner: layered paired native-v2 plus adapter current/reset identity plus exact joint/private mask and role binding

P.state_carried: complete causal pool and response input
P.history_carried: matched non-primary encounter/audit state excluded from V
P.hybrid: one independently causal component of the composite carrier and V

H_P.state_carried: not a causal carrier; L remains audit-only

M_H.state_carried: absent from the accepted response mask
M_H.history_carried: native output port of H_P and sole front-mask component
M_H.hybrid: native output port of H_P and one of two front-mask components

cross_mode_symbol_qualification.L: audit-only in every mode except non-causal admission/idempotency filtering for H_P updates
cross_mode_symbol_qualification.rewrite_rule: a later mode may reuse symbols and structural machinery but cannot change an earlier mode's causal roles, masks, interventions, or accepted realization class

operational_hypothesis_index.family_distinction: one P versus one H_P/M_H versus one composite P+H_P/M_H
V follows P versus M_H versus the joint live P/M_H relation
lineage remains audit-only while physical state/history roles stay mode-specific
native P intervention versus active H_P intervention versus both independent component interventions
mode-specific marginal and insufficient-repetition alternatives remain unresolved until I04
private one-node, one-history, or one-pair reads cannot aggregate across partitions
direct/controller equivalence cannot replace the registered mode-specific causal path
equal-P order invariance versus history order sensitivity versus matched-P hybrid history-component sensitivity
alternate eligible responder uses the same mode-specific non-private mask; R05 remains unresolved

source_obligations.duty: I06 must preserve the frozen fixture's unique registered source-to-P path or add an explicit route/channel admission key; source/target membership is the current exact adapter filter.
R05 retention, capacity, and scientific access comparison remain I04/I06 and execution work.
I06 must bound branch/event counts and either retain these not-applicable lifecycle classes or register a new reviewed construction; no conformance fixture capacity may become scientific calibration.

I06 must expose the paired procedure as the only registered continuation interface and validate manifest component hashes explicitly; the conformance harness proves the governed path, not a generic atomic transaction API.

I04 and I06 validators must reject the I03B fixture coefficient, amounts/types/times, threshold, packet amount, branch IDs, response values, comparator, and evidence digest; only the pre-runtime fold family may be imported.

The common-profile initial composite digest is retained once as the deterministic fresh-fixture witness rather than duplicated per standard branch; private profiles are identified by their separate frozen configurations and fresh construction.
operationalize/register the complete qualitative 2x2 with exact held-fixed rules and no inherited conformance values
retain unique physical source-to-P routes or explicit non-label/non-digest route/channel admission key and bound token type identity
register neutral-contact matching across all scientifically relevant timing/support/opportunity fields or explicit stratification

expose only one manifest-validating paired load/reset continuation interface; add failure checks for partial/mismatched load, cross-pairing, one-sided/repeated reset, stale M_H, and wrong baseline/mask
bound history/event counts, overflow, P capacity, M_H/readout bounds, and native reservoir adequacy while retaining or separately reviewing lifecycle classes
implement machine rejection from every registry source/scope, exact value, branch/topology identity, observation, comparator, outcome, and digest including trivial serialization reuse
bind exact common/private role identity and reject P/H_P/M_H or adapter-baseline cross-load before continuation
verify all three accepted profiles, OP mappings, restoration ownership, quarantine, no ranking, mode-indexed I04, and semantic-equivalence requirements before passing only the discriminator gate

reject_recursive_scopes: evidence, reconstruction, restoration, and source digests
direct equality and trivial serialized reuse
allowed_imports: structural adapter code under exact source identity

i04_import_boundary.shared_artifact_rule: shared I04/I05 artifacts require explicit semantic-equivalence proof; otherwise they remain mode-indexed
